Welcome to the Seed Launch Planner. This is a document that we put
together for you to really walk through your entire Seed Launch. I am a big fan of seed
launches. The reason I'm a fan is it allows you to start off with the most minimal list, just
a tiny little list, and then use that list to make some sales. You're making sales before you
actually make the product, which is fantastic. Through this process you create a product.
It's not any product. It's going to be a great product. The reason behind that is because
you're using the feedback from your early customers, from your first customers. It's
almost like a pilot product. You're using their feedback to help you make a great product.
I tell you this from personal experience because the first version of Product Launch
Formula was developed this way. I initially created this product launch workshop, taught
it through a series of teleconferences, and really learned how to teach it, and learned how
to create this great product.
I had done plenty of launches. I knew how to do launches, but I didn't necessarily
know how to teach it. When I came out with the very first version of Product Launch
Formula way back in 2005, it was a great product. It wasn't a great product because I'm
some genius teacher or I was just born knowing how to teach product launches. It was
because I had this interactive Seed Launch process that enabled me to learn how to teach
product launches. This hasn't just worked for me. It's worked for a lot of people. It's
something I have gone back to. I just did another Seed Launch, oh, a couple years ago for
another product. It was a fantastic process even though I knew my product really well. I
knew the topic really well. It was still an amazing process to go through. This Seed
Launch Planner in one document walks you through how to do it. It starts off at the very
beginning with your niche, your avatar, your product, your offer, building your very,
very, very first list.
Starting to build your seed list. If you don't have any list whatsoever you'll need to
get up to … 50 people I would consider minimum. It'd be better to get to 200 or 300
people. If you're just starting out and that sounds daunting, just follow the steps. Follow
the steps in launching your list. It's not that hard to get started. Remember no one starts
with a list. Then you develop your offer. Remember the offer's always about the
transformation, and then you launch. The great thing about a Seed Launch is the launch
is very, very simple. Usually, it's one prelaunch video and then one sales video. We walk
you through that in this launch planner. Then you go through your launch. You launch it.
Give you a lot of information on how to launch it including scripting this out for you.
Then you move onto creating and delivering your product.
The key here is it can be super simple. You're basically going to survey your
